name: claim_number_present
expression: claim_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(claim_number)) > 0
description: claim_number is required for Proof of Loss extraction.

name: policy_number_present
expression: policy_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(policy_number)) > 0
description: policy_number is required for Proof of Loss extraction.

name: insured_name_present
expression: insured_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(insured_name)) > 0
description: insured_name is required for Proof of Loss extraction.

name: claimed_amount_present
expression: claimed_amount IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(claimed_amount)) > 0
description: claimed_amount is required for Proof of Loss extraction.

name: claimed_amount_non_negative
description: claimed_amount should be non-negative when present.

name: actual_cash_value_non_negative
description: actual_cash_value should be non-negative when present.

name: replacement_cost_value_non_negative
description: replacement_cost_value should be non-negative when present.

name: deductible_amount_non_negative
description: deductible_amount should be non-negative when present.
